name: trace_requirements
description: Manage requirement traceability links between artefacts and report coverage. Actions: 'link' creates a directional relationship (derives/refines/tests/implements/conflicts/duplicates), 'unlink' removes it, 'parents' lists what a requirement derives from, 'children' lists what derives from it, 'matrix' produces a full traceability table for a project, 'coverage' shows the percentage of requirements that have at least one link. Use before sign-off to verify completeness.

action.description: Operation: 'link' adds a traceability relationship, 'unlink' removes it, 'parents' shows what source_id derives FROM, 'children' shows what derives FROM source_id, 'matrix' builds a full project table, 'coverage' shows what % of requirements have links.

user_id.description: User ID from session context. Always required.

project.description: Project name/slug. Required for link, matrix, coverage.

source_id.description: ID of the source artefact. Required for link, unlink, parents, children.

target_id.description: ID of the target artefact. Required for link and unlink.

link_type.description: Nature of the relationship. Required for link and unlink.

source_type.description: Artefact type of the source. Defaults to 'requirement'.

target_type.description: Artefact type of the target. Defaults to 'requirement'.

link_id.description: UUID of the created/existing link (link action).

parents.description: List of parent link records (parents action).

children.description: List of child link records (children action).

links.description: All links for the project (matrix action).

unlinked_ids.description: IDs of requirements with no links (coverage action).
